nasb.text: When your dread comes like a storm And your calamity comes like a whirlwind, When distress and anguish come upon you.

esv.text: when terror strikes you like a storm and your calamity comes like a whirlwind, when distress and anguish come upon you.

cnv.text: 驚恐臨到你們好像風暴， 災難如同颶風來臨， 患難困苦臨到你們身上。

ccb.text: 那时，恐惧如风暴袭击你们， 灾难如旋风临到你们， 忧愁和苦难吞没你们。

csbs.text: 那时，恐惧像风暴那样临到， 灾难像旋风那样来临， 患难和困苦临到你们身上。
